metadata.title: BApps | Custom Application Development
metadata.description: We build custom web apps, mobile apps, and landing pages. Turning ideas into exceptional digital experiences.

hero.title: We turn ideas into software that sells
hero.subtitle: Software built for you. A committed team, a clear process, real results.

services.title: What we build
services.subtitle: Each service is designed to solve a real business problem — not to fill a catalog.

webApps.title: Your custom system
webApps.description: Your competitors use the same generic tools. You can have something built exactly for your business — that works the way you work, not the other way around.

mobileApps.title: App for your phone
mobileApps.description: Your customers on iOS and Android from a single codebase. No paying double for two separate projects, no sacrificing quality on either platform.

landingPages.title: Your digital storefront
landingPages.description: Every visitor who bounces is money lost. We design pages that convert visitors into customers — optimized for Google from day one.

ecommerce.title: Online store
ecommerce.description: Your store never closes. Payments, inventory, and shipping in one place — get ready to sell while you sleep and scale when you're ready.

uiux.title: Easy and beautiful
uiux.description: A confusing design loses customers. We build interfaces anyone understands in seconds and that make people want to come back — not leave.

consulting.title: We help you decide
consulting.description: Before spending on development, we make sure what you want to build is the right call. One hour of consulting can save you months of misdirected work.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.subtitle: Some of the experiences we've built.

projectsPage.title: Our projects
projectsPage.subtitle: Every project is a story of collaboration, innovation, and results.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Tell us your idea. First consultation is free, no commitment.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A clear process, no surprises. You know exactly where we are at every moment.

discovery.title: We understand your idea
discovery.description: A call to learn about your business, your users, and what you need the software to do for you. No jargon, no commitments.

design.title: We design together
design.description: Before writing a single line of code, we show you exactly how it will work. A clickable prototype you can touch, test, and approve.

development.title: We build in sprints
development.description: Deliveries every 2 weeks. You see progress live, request changes before they're locked in. No black boxes, no end-of-project surprises.

launch.title: We launch and stay
launch.description: We deploy, train you, and stay available. We don't disappear when the project ends — that's what sets us apart.

whyUs.title: Why choose us
whyUs.subtitle: We're not the cheapest option. We're the most reliable one.
whyUs.disclaimer: We don't take projects we can't do well. That lets us give 100% to everything we take on.

dedicated.title: A team, not a freelancer
dedicated.description: There's always someone available. You never depend on one person who might disappear or have other priorities.

ownCode.title: Our own code, no subcontracts
ownCode.description: The team that quotes is the team that builds. No hidden third parties, no quality surprises halfway through.

response.title: Response within 24 hours
response.description: Always. A question, a bug, an urgent change — someone from the team responds that same day.

transparent.title: Pricing with no fine print
transparent.description: Clear budget from day 1. If something changes, we tell you before — never after it's already done.

selective.title: We choose our projects carefully
selective.description: We don't take everything. If a project isn't right for us, we'll say so honestly and point you in the right direction.

partnership.title: Your success is our portfolio
partnership.description: Every project we deliver is our best advertising. We have every incentive to make you succeed.

contact.title: Get a quote
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your idea and we'll get back to you within 24h.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll reach out soon.
contact.error: We could not send your message. Please try again in a few minutes.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Looks like this rocket got lost in space.
